topic: Fee Reports and Student Payment History
summary: Describes the various reports available in the fee module, including daily collection, due fees, and individual student payment history, along with filtering and export options.
navigation: Student's Fee Section > Payment History (for individual student history)
Dashboard > Transaction List (for common daily transactions)
steps: Access 'Fee Reports' for a list of available reports (e.g., Daily Fee Report, Combined Daily Collection, Due Fee).

For Due Fee Report: Apply filters for class, stream, and batch. Use 'Show student with zero dues' (Yes/No) to include/exclude fully paid students. Use 'Awake status' filter to see students who have paid for the current session or only those who haven't paid any amount. Export data to Excel.
Access 'Transaction List' for a common list of daily transactions, with an export to Excel option.
Access 'Payment History' within a student's profile to view individual fee transactions and receipts.
business_rules: Reports can be filtered by various criteria (class, batch, stream, due status, student status).
Data can be exported to Excel.
important_notes: 'Awake status' refers to students who have paid fees for the current session.
An amount-wise filter for due fees is not currently available but can be requested for future development.
questions: Where can I find reports on daily fee collection?
How do I check the list of students with outstanding fees?
Can I filter the due fee report by class or batch?
Is there a report to see a student's individual payment history?
Can I export fee reports to Excel?
